text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The Tokyo Daishoten, held at Oi Racecourse, is a
major dirt race that marks the year's end.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It is here that, once again, Copano Rickey will
face off against Hokko Tarumae and Wonder
Acute.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
(Tarumae is here. I wonder if I should say
something to her. I still have a little time before
the race starts.)

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: (Ah, she's leaving! Wait, where is she going?!)

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: (The Oi wharf? What's she doing there?)

text_block_list.name: Hokko Tarumae
text_block_list.text: ...I know you're there.

text_block_list.name: Hokko Tarumae
text_block_list.text:
I know you're there, Rickey. You can come out
now.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: Huh?! You noticed me?! Um... okay...

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: Ahahaha... Sorry. I was just, um, curious.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: I was about to ask what you were doing here.

text_block_list.name: Hokko Tarumae
text_block_list.text: The port...

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: Huh?

text_block_list.name: Hokko Tarumae
text_block_list.text: Tomakomai has a port, just like Oi.

text_block_list.name: Hokko Tarumae
text_block_list.text: It's no match for Tokyo Bay, of course.

text_block_list.name: Hokko Tarumae
text_block_list.text:
The amount of freight handled here each year is
on a whole other scale.

text_block_list.name: Hokko Tarumae
text_block_list.text:
I know because I asked one of the higher-ups
from the Tomakomai harbor office while I was
back home for a local event.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: I-is that so?

text_block_list.name: Hokko Tarumae
text_block_list.text:
Two ports. Oi and Tomakomai. But one's so much
more famous.

text_block_list.name: Hokko Tarumae
text_block_list.text:
But there's a silver lining. They're both connected,
you see.

text_block_list.name: Hokko Tarumae
text_block_list.text:
From Oi to Tomakomai. Which means, if I do my
best...

text_block_list.name: Hokko Tarumae
text_block_list.text:
Maybe, just like the freight, I can deliver a bit of
everyone's attention to my home.

text_block_list.name: Hokko Tarumae
text_block_list.text:
That's what I think to myself whenever I race here
at Oi.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: Tarumae...

text_block_list.name: Hokko Tarumae
text_block_list.text:
So I won't lose. I can't. Because if I do, I won't
send anything back.

text_block_list.name: Hokko Tarumae
text_block_list.text:
Even if it's not much, I'll take whatever I can get.
My hometown deserves it.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: ...That's what she said. She was really intense.
choice_data_list: That's a heavy burden to take upon herself.
That's a heavy burden to take upon herself.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Wonder Acute and I both nod along as Copano
Rickey tells us what happened. It seems Hokko
Tarumae will be a formidable opponent today.

text_block_list.name: Wonder Acute
text_block_list.text:
But, you know what, Rickey? You don't need to
be afraid.

text_block_list.name: Wonder Acute
text_block_list.text:
When you're racing, running's all that matters.
And there isn't a racer out there who won't give it
her all.

text_block_list.name: Wonder Acute
text_block_list.text: That goes for you, Tarumae, and myself, too.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Yeah. You're right. They might not be doing it for
their hometown...

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
But it's the last big race of the year. None of them
are going to hold back. We all have a chance to
take the win!
choice_data_list:
That's the spirit. Don't let yourself be
intimidated.

That's the spirit. Don't let yourself be
intimidated.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! I almost got caught up in Tarumae's
feelings. But I'm not Tarumae. I'm me! ☆

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
All right! It's the final grand stage before the
year's over! Today, I'm gonna show everyone how
Copano Rickey runs!
